Holbrook

Arma X

PowerElongatedUSAP approved2025Advanced

2025 elongated power paddle from Holbrook, with a 14mm core and a stiff, hollow feel.

$280

Street price as of July 2026 — retailers move it.

Search Amazon — Holbrook Arma X (opens in new tab)

This is an affiliate link — we may earn a commission if you buy, at no extra cost to you. It never changes which paddles appear here or how they're described. As an Amazon Associate I earn from qualifying purchases. How this works.

Measured performance.

Where this paddle sits against the 514 we track. We describe the band it lands in rather than publishing the underlying lab figures — those are licensed, and the bands are the part we can share.

ControlLowBottom fifth

Touch and placement — the trade-off against raw power.

ForgivenessHighMiddle of the catalog

How stable the head stays on an off-centre hit.

Hand speedMediumLower range

How quickly it moves in a hands battle at the kitchen.

Spin and power aren't shown here: this paddle hasn't been through the bench those two bands come from, and 156 of the 514 haven't. What's above is measured; nothing is estimated.

Full specifications

BrandHolbrook
Released2025
Tournament approvalUSAP
ShapeElongated
Impact feelStiff/Hollow
Core thickness14 mm
Static weight8.2 oz
Balance point240 mm
Grip circumference4.25 in
Best forAdvanced

Where to go from here.

Same play style, a different trade-off — one steps up the measured performance, one protects your wallet.

Top pick

11SIX24 Power 2 Pegasus

$210 −$70 vs this

The step up in this play style: more forgiving · quicker through the air · aimed at intermediates. Widebody shape, 16mm core.

See this paddle →
Value pick

Vatic Pro V-Sol Power V7

$110 −$170 vs this

Keeps the power character for less: more forgiving · aimed at intermediates. Same elongated shape, 16mm core.
